The '''defense of Vladet''' was a battle that occurred in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]] when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] attacked [[Grand Isle]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vladet]]. Grand Isle served as the Imperial headquarters for the [[Rachuk sector/Legends|Rachuk sector]], and the attack was in retaliation for a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Raid on Talasea|raid]] against [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] base on [[Talasea]].

The primary force in the battle was [[Defender Wing]], whose thirty-six [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] were tasked with destroying the Imperial base on Vladet. They were escorted by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] ten [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 Corellian Corvette]] ''[[Eridain]]''. [[Champion Squadron|Champion]] and [[Guardian Squadron]]s, each escorted by four X-wings, led the attack, while [[Warden Squadron]] was held in reserve due to its smaller escort. Only four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] were on hand to defend the base, and they were quickly shot down. The Y-wings bypassed Grand Isle's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] by blasting through the side of the dead volcano crater in which it was located, then destroyed the base.

In space, the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] ''[[Expeditious]]'' and [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] [[Ravager (Lancer-class)|''Ravager'']] dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. While they were too late to save Grand Isle, the ''Expeditious'' outgunned the ''Eridain'' and the ''Ravager'' presented a severe threat to the New Republic [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. However, [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] quickly thought of a plan to deal with the ''Ravager''. Over [[General/Legends|General]] [[Horton Salm/Legends|Horton Salm's]] objections, Horn had [[Warden Squadron]] target his own X-wing with their [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], while flying toward the ''Lancer''-class frigate. At the last moment, he dove under the ''Ravager'', and twenty-two torpedoes hit the ship and destroyed it. Two torpedoes, which were fired slightly late, continued to chase Horn's X-wing until his [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2 unit]] [[Whistler]] deactivated its targeting beacon.

Their mission accomplished, the New Republic forces then withdrew from Vladet, forcing the Empire to commit additional forces to rebuild their sector headquarters. Lieutenant Horn was temporarily relieved of duty, as General Salm had never actually authorized him to take command of Warden Squadron.
